ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on December 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar May-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
